commands.review_summary:
The PR routes embedded runner and session transcript mutations through owned write-lock publication and adds focused regressions for false external-takeover detection around embedded transcript writes.

PR surface: Source +114, Tests +267. Total +381 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main drops publishOwnedWrite options on AgentSession and embedded attempt write-lock paths, and the PR body includes a focused RED regression command and failure text. I did not run tests because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This protected maintainer draft needs session-owner review and current-head live behavior proof before merge, not an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(agents): publish embedded transcript writes
target.body:
Opened on behalf of Onur Solmaz (`osolmaz`). This is in progress; implementation is pushed and local validation is passing. Live Hugging Face/Crabbox verification is still pending.

AI-assisted change.

## Summary

Telegram/Hugging Face runs could stream a full answer and then append the generic error.
The embedded runner was still treating some OpenClaw-owned transcript writes as external session takeovers.
This change creates one embedded transcript mutation boundary, forwards owned-write options correctly, and routes the embedded runner's transcript mutations through that boundary.

## Reproduction

The PR contains a local regression for the Hugging Face failure shape.
The test builds a transcript with a compaction row and an orphaned trailing user message, releases the embedded prompt fence, repairs the orphan by branching back to the compaction row, appends the next user turn as an owned mutation, and then reacquires the session write lock.
Before the fix, this failed with the same takeover error seen in the Space.

Command that reproduced the RED failure before the fix:

```text
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.session-lock.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose
```

Observed RED result before the fix:

```text
FAIL |agents| src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.session-lock.test.ts > embedded attempt session lock lifecycle > reproduces orphaned trailing user repair tripping the prompt fence
AssertionError: promise rejected "EmbeddedAttemptSessionTakeoverError: sess..." instead of resolving
Caused by: EmbeddedAttemptSessionTakeoverError: session file changed while embedded prompt lock was released
```

This matches the Space failure class:

```text
Removed already-queued orphaned user message to prevent consecutive user turns
EmbeddedAttemptSessionTakeoverError: session file changed while embedded prompt lock was released
```

## What Changed

The key fix is that embedded transcript mutations now go through a single controller.
That controller uses the existing session write lock and always publishes OpenClaw-owned writes to the prompt fence.

- Added `EmbeddedTranscriptMutationController` for embedded-run transcript mutations.
- Fixed `attempt.ts` so `AgentSession` owned-write options are forwarded instead of dropped.
- Routed orphan-user repair, hook-block persistence, Google prompt-cache entries, session-yield cleanup, mid-turn precheck cleanup, post-prompt attempt entries, context-engine maintenance rewrites, and bootstrap completion entries through the controller.
- Kept real external takeover detection active by continuing to use the existing session lock controller.
- Added a guard test that fails if direct embedded transcript writes or option-dropping lock forwarding are reintroduced in `attempt.ts`.

## Testing

The local regression now passes, the embedded runner e2e path still passes, and core test typecheck passes.
The earlier raw `pnpm exec tsc --project tsconfig.core.json` command still hits an unrelated exported-type issue in `src/secrets/config-io.ts`; the repo's core test typecheck command is green.

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.session-lock.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.transcript-mutation-guard.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.e2e.test.ts -- --reporter=verbose`
- `pnpm tsgo:core:test`
- `git diff --check`

Not yet tested:

- Crabbox/live provider run.
- Rebuilt Hugging Face Space image with this exact PR head.

## Risks

The main risk is weakening external takeover protection.
This change avoids that by using the existing session lock controller and only publishing writes made inside the explicit embedded transcript mutation boundary.

- External edit rejection tests still pass.
- Existing owned compaction/message publication tests still pass.
- The new guard test blocks the exact option-forwarding regression that kept the previous narrow fix from taking effect.

## Follow-ups Before Ready For Review

- Run `codex review --base origin/main` and address any P0/P1 findings.
- Check PR comments and CI.
- Try a live Crabbox/Hugging Face verification without merging.
